modifications: Replaced manual error logging with utility functions

Error type detection through message parsing
gotchas_discovered: Different error types require unique handling strategies
Need to distinguish between known and unknown errors
Importance of preserving original error context while providing user-friendly messages
recommendations: Implement similar error handling utilities in other parts of the application
Consider adding more specific error subtypes if needed
